title: Medium User
description: A Medium user profile containing identifying information, username, display name, profile URL, and avatar image.

id.description: The unique identifier for the user on Medium.

username.description: The user's username on Medium, used in their profile URL path.

name.description: The user's display name as shown on their profile.

url.description: The URL to the user's Medium profile page.

imageUrl.description: The URL to the user's avatar image on Medium.
